name: Frisby.js
description: REST API testing framework built on top of Jest for Node.js that makes testing API endpoints easy with fluent assertion helpers.

seo.title: Frisby.js — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Frisby.js: REST API testing framework built on top of Jest for Node.js that makes testing API endpoints easy with fluent assertion helpers.

when_to_use: REST API endpoint testing with Jest-native assertions
Contract validation for Node.js service integrations
Fluent HTTP assertion chains in TypeScript test suites
Automated API regression tests in CI pipelines

pros: Fluent, chainable API specifically for REST APIs
Runs on Jest, reuses familiar matchers
Quick to add to existing Node projects
cons: Niche compared to SuperTest or Playwright APIRequest
Ties you to Jest as the runner
review.verdict: Pleasant API test DSL if you already live in Jest, but SuperTest or Playwright cover more ground.
review.best_for: Node teams wanting a BDD-ish wrapper for HTTP tests on top of Jest
review.not_for: Teams needing GraphQL, gRPC or complex orchestrated contract tests

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
